codeReview.summary: The latest fix now closes the prior blocking failure: `VectorStoreFileBatches::upload_and_poll` still uploads new files concurrently, but it now joins every spawned upload worker before returning and only surfaces an error after all worker handles have been collected. The merged `file_ids` order and existing empty-work/polling behavior remain intact, and the new regression test specifically proves the helper waits for a delayed sibling upload before returning a failed result.

summary: Reviewed the prior failing scrutiny report and synthesis, the latest handoff/transcript skeleton, the current implementation in `src/resources/vector_stores.rs`, and the added regression coverage in `tests/vector_store_file_batches_contract.rs`. The previously reported failure-path bug is fixed in commit `1eca8feea961a683976c1419b75b43ada73ca357`: the helper now joins all upload workers before surfacing the first error, so no evidence-backed blocking issue remains in this feature.
